title: senecio oxyodontus
intro: Senecio oxyodontus, also known as Green Ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio oxyodontus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Senecio oxyodontus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
